name: Feyd

skills.name: Jade Carriage - View from Above
skills.description: Can jump onto and walk on natural walls. Basic Attack becomes ranged while on a wall.

skills.name: Jade Chase - Returning Strike
skills.description: Dashes, dealing damage to enemies in his path and launching them. Enhances his next 3 Basic Attacks. Enhanced Basic Attacks deal extra damage and restore Health.

skills.name: Hardened Jade Seal
skills.description: Damages and marks nearby enemies. Using the skill again unleashes 4 strikes of damage. The last strike will defeat marked enemies with low health. Can use to jump down from walls.

skillsZh.name: 玉輦・星眸
skillsZh.description: 暃可在自然牆體上行走，獲得遠程普攻。

skillsZh.name: 逐玉・鋒回
skillsZh.description: 暃位移，對路徑上的敵人造成傷害並將其擊飛，強化下三次普攻，額外造成傷害並回復生命值。

skillsZh.name: 凝玉之印
skillsZh.description: 暃對周圍敵人造成傷害並將其標記，再次施放則造成四次傷害。敵方生命值過低時，最後一次傷害將直接斬殺。在牆上施放【凝玉之印】可下牆。

tips: Build: Boots of Resistance, Dragon's Rage, Eternity Blade.
tipsZh: 暃（打野）：梯度 B，勝率 51.67%（Camp HOK）。
出裝：抵抗之靴、怒龍劍盾、無盡戰刃.

faqs.question: Is Feyd good in current season?
faqs.answer: Feyd is Tier B Assassin with 51.67% win rate, 0.45% pick rate, and 0.09% ban rate (Camp HOK international).

faqs.question: What is the best Feyd build?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Boots of Resistance, Dragon's Rage, Eternity Blade, Sage's Sanctuary, Destiny, Splendor.

faqs.question: How to counter Feyd?
faqs.answer: Pick Hou Yi, Daji, Angela. Strong into Lapulapu, Ata, Sakeer.

faqsZh.question: 暃 這版本適合上分嗎？
faqsZh.answer: 暃 為 B 梯度，勝率 51.67%、選取 0.45%、禁用 0.09%（Camp HOK 國際服）。

faqsZh.question: 暃 出裝怎麼搭配？
faqsZh.answer: 推薦：抵抗之靴、怒龍劍盾、無盡戰刃、賢者的庇護、名刀・司命、輝月.

faqsZh.question: 怎麼克制 暃？
faqsZh.answer: 可選 Hou Yi、Daji、Angela。暃 克制 Lapulapu、Ata、Sakeer。

metaAnalysis: Counters: Lapulapu, Ata, Sakeer. Weak into: Hou Yi, Daji, Angela.

guide.overview: Feyd is a Medium Assassin (Jungling) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier B with 51.1% win rate and 0.4% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
guide.hook: Feyd: Can jump onto and walk on natural walls while gaining Movement Speed.
guide.bestBuild: Rush Rapacious Bite, Boots of Tranquility, Axe of Torment, then complete Master Sword, Ominous Premonition. Use preset tabs for jungle, clash, or CN-style paths when draft requires it.
guide.arcanaSpells: Run Mutation for stats that match Feyd's Assassin kit. Take Haste & Smite — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
guide.combo: Standard trade: Jade Chase - Returning Strike → Stepping on Jade → Hardened Jade Seal → weave basic attacks. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for passive value.

skillOrder.priority: Skill 2 → Skill 1 → Hardened Jade Seal (max Skill 2 first)
skillOrder.reason: Stepping on Jade provides mobility or stick—max first. Jade Chase - Returning Strike second for damage. Hardened Jade Seal on every level.

combos.name: Standard trade
combos.steps: Jade Chase - Returning Strike → Stepping on Jade → Hardened Jade Seal → weave basic attacks

combos.name: All-in
combos.steps: Hardened Jade Seal after full rotation when Flash is down
combos.when: Gank or backline dive with team CC

arcanaRows.effect: Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive.

guide.laning: Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.
guide.teamfight: Wait for CC from your team, then dive carry with full combo. Exit with reset or flash if focus fired.
guide.highRank: Feyd sits at Tier B globally (51.1% WR). In high rank, pick only into favorable matchups or when you have a dedicated pocket pick.
comparisons: Feyd vs Wukong (Assassin, Tier S): Wukong is 1.3% pick / 49.7% WR. Feyd has +1.4% WR vs Wukong in Camp data. Choose Feyd when you need Jungling identity; choose Wukong for Jungling comfort.
Feyd vs Musashi (Assassin, Tier A): Musashi is 1.1% pick / 50.7% WR. Feyd has +0.4% WR vs Musashi in Camp data. Choose Feyd when you need Jungling identity; choose Musashi for Jungling comfort.

matchups.summary: Feyd excels into Lapulapu, Ata, Sakeer. Avoid blind picking into Hou Yi, Daji, Angela without team peel.
